'''âth-z-v''' ('''kathazav''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:unbell|unbell]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| th-z-v
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:unbell|unbell]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âth-z-v
|-
! Lemma
| kathazav
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thithazav|thithazav]] || [[word:jithazav|jithazav]] || [[word:shithazav|shithazav]] || [[word:kithazav|kithazav]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuthazav|thuthuthazav]] || [[word:jujuthazav|jujuthazav]] || [[word:shushuthazav|shushuthazav]] || [[word:kukuthazav|kukuthazav]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thuthazav|thuthazav]] || [[word:juthazav|juthazav]] || [[word:shuthazav|shuthazav]] || [[word:kuthazav|kuthazav]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thuthazav|thuthazav]] || [[word:juthazav|juthazav]] || [[word:shuthazav|shuthazav]] || [[word:kuthazav|kuthazav]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thethazav|thethazav]] || [[word:jethazav|jethazav]] || [[word:shethazav|shethazav]] || [[word:kethazav|kethazav]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothothazav|thothothazav]] || [[word:jojothazav|jojothazav]] || [[word:shoshothazav|shoshothazav]] || [[word:kokothazav|kokothazav]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thothazav|thothazav]] || [[word:jothazav|jothazav]] || [[word:shothazav|shothazav]] || [[word:kothazav|kothazav]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thothazav|thothazav]] || [[word:jothazav|jothazav]] || [[word:shothazav|shothazav]] || [[word:kothazav|kothazav]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠthazav|thĂŠthazav]] || [[word:jĂŠthazav|jĂŠthazav]] || [[word:shĂŠthazav|shĂŠthazav]] || [[word:kĂŠthazav|kĂŠthazav]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathathazav|thathathazav]] || [[word:jajathazav|jajathazav]] || [[word:shashathazav|shashathazav]] || [[word:kakathazav|kakathazav]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thathazav|thathazav]] || [[word:jathazav|jathazav]] || [[word:shathazav|shathazav]] || [[word:kathazav|kathazav]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thathazav|thathazav]] || [[word:jathazav|jathazav]] || [[word:shathazav|shathazav]] || [[word:kathazav|kathazav]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shathazav|shathazav]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshathazav|goshathazav]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishathazav|gokishathazav]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shathazavnĂŒ|shathazavnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshathazavnknĂŒ|goshathazavnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishathazavnĂŒ|gokishathazavnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shathazavshĂ«|shathazavshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshathazavnkshĂ«|goshathazavnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishathazavshĂ«|gokishathazavshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shathazavro|shathazavro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshathazavnkro|goshathazavnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishathazavro|gokishathazavro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shathazavmu|shathazavmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshathazavnkmu|goshathazavnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishathazavmu|gokishathazavmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shathazavsher|shathazavsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshathazavnksher|goshathazavnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishathazavsher|gokishathazavsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shathazavng|shathazavng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshathazavnkng|goshathazavnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishathazavng|gokishathazavng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shathazavya|shathazavya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshathazavnkya|goshathazavnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishathazavya|gokishathazavya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shathazavyam|shathazavyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshathazavnkyam|goshathazavnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishathazavyam|gokishathazavyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shathazavnĂŒshĂ«|shathazavnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshathazavnknĂŒshĂ«|goshathazavnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishathazavnĂŒshĂ«|gokishathazavnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shathazavnĂŒro|shathazavnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshathazavnknĂŒro|goshathazavnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishathazavnĂŒro|gokishathazavnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shathazavnĂŒmu|shathazavnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshathazavnknĂŒmu|goshathazavnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishathazavnĂŒmu|gokishathazavnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shathazavshĂ«nĂŒ|shathazavshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshathazavnkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshathazavnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishathazavshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishathazavshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shathazavshĂ«ro|shathazavshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshathazavnkshĂ«ro|goshathazavnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishathazavshĂ«ro|gokishathazavshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shathazavshĂ«mu|shathazavshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshathazavnkshĂ«mu|goshathazavnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishathazavshĂ«mu|gokishathazavshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shathazavronĂŒ|shathazavronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshathazavnkronĂŒ|goshathazavnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishathazavronĂŒ|gokishathazavronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shathazavroshĂ«|shathazavroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshathazavnkroshĂ«|goshathazavnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishathazavroshĂ«|gokishathazavroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shathazavromu|shathazavromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshathazavnkromu|goshathazavnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishathazavromu|gokishathazavromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shathazavmunĂŒ|shathazavmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshathazavnkmunĂŒ|goshathazavnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishathazavmunĂŒ|gokishathazavmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shathazavmushĂ«|shathazavmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshathazavnkmushĂ«|goshathazavnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishathazavmushĂ«|gokishathazavmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shathazavmuro|shathazavmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshathazavnkmuro|goshathazavnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishathazavmuro|gokishathazavmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==

{{wordpage|806ef69}}
